title: koeleria capensis
intro: Koeleria capensis, also known as Cape hair grass or tufted hair grass, is a species of grass native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Koeleria capensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of Koeleria capensis are typically made by infusing the dried leaves and flowers in hot water, and it can also be used as a tea or added to herbal blends for its medicinal and health benefits.
